case_title: UNITED BRANDS PRODUCTS DESIGN, DEVELOPMENT AND MAR VS. LENJO, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,823.98 FILED BY UNITED BRANDS PRODUCTS DESIGN, DEVELOPMENT AND MAR KETING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT LENJO, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-2011 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF UNITED BRANDS PRODUCTS DESIGN, DEVELOPMENT AND MAR KETING, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$82.50) SERVED NOV-16-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LENJO, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2011 - CONTINUED TO DEC-29-2011 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. ORIGINAL COURT FILE RECEIVED AFTER THE UNCONTESTED HEARING, VENUE CHALLENGE FILED BY THE DEFENDANT. CONTINUED FOR HEARING ON VENUE CHALLENGE PER THE COURT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. DEFENDANTS MOTION CHALLENGING VENUE IS GRANTED. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE, PER JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. NO APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
